title: (Bullish Signal) UI, RSI Indicator left the oversold zone on January 15, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that UI's price could be shifting from a downtrend to an uptrend. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 24 similar cases where UI's RSI Indicator left the oversold zone, and in 19 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 79%.  Current price $253.07 crossed the support line at $274.51 and is trading between $274.51 support and $194.83 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 12/14/20 - 01/15/21, the price experienced a -2% Downtrend. During the week of 01/08/21 - 01/15/21, the stock fell -4%.

https://preview.redd.it/292tces5fcc61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=50627b61da3bf2168de424dc8adf03e170885de7

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where UI's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 19 of 24 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The 10-day Moving Average for UI crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 12, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 10 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

Following a +0.85% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where UI advanced for three days, in 261 of 349 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

UI may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 214 of 328 cases where UI Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 65%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8782364-ubiquiti-ui-247-29-rsi-indicator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-january-15-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
